description: This policy creates a Guest Configuration assignment to audit Windows virtual machines that are not set to the specified time zone. It also creates a system-assigned managed identity and deploys the VM extension for Guest Configuration. This policy should only be used along with its corresponding audit policy in an initiative. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: c246d146-82b0-301f-32e7-1065dcd248b7
display_name: Review changes for any unauthorized changes
description: CMA_C1204 - Review changes for any unauthorized changes

name: c24c537f-2516-4c2f-aac5-2cd26baa3d26
display_name: Configure Windows Arc Machines to be associated with a Data Collection Rule or a Data Collection Endpoint
description: Deploy Association to link Windows Arc machines to the specified Data Collection Rule or the specified Data Collection Endpoint. The list of locations are updated over time as support is increased.

name: c251913d-7d24-4958-af87-478ed3b9ba41
display_name: Flow logs should be configured for every network security group
description: Audit for network security groups to verify if flow logs are configured. Enabling flow logs allows to log information about IP traffic flowing through network security group. It can be used for optimizing network flows, monitoring throughput, verifying compliance, detecting intrusions and more.

name: c25d9a16-bc35-4e15-a7e5-9db606bf9ed4
display_name: [Deprecated]: Azure Defender for container registries should be enabled
description: Azure Defender for container registries provides vulnerability scanning of any images pulled within the last 30 days, pushed to your registry, or imported, and exposes detailed findings per image.

name: c25dcf31-878f-4eba-98eb-0818fdc6a334
display_name: Azure Virtual Desktop hostpools should disable public network access
description: Disabling public network access improves security and keeps your data safe by ensuring that access to the Azure Virtual Desktop service is not exposed to the public internet. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/avdprivatelink.

name: c285a320-8830-4665-9cc7-bbd05fc7c5c0
display_name: App Service app slots should require FTPS only
description: Enable FTPS enforcement for enhanced security.

name: c29c38cb-74a7-4505-9a06-e588ab86620a
display_name: Enforce SSL connection should be enabled for PostgreSQL flexible servers
description: Azure Database for PostgreSQL supports connecting your Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server to client applications using Secure Sockets Layer (SSL). Enforcing SSL connections between your database flexible server and your client applications helps protect against 'man in the middle' attacks by encrypting the data stream between the server and your application. This configuration enforces that SSL is always enabled for accessing your PostgreSQL flexible server.

name: c29fe1b2-c0b0-4d92-a988-84b484801707
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Network Managers (microsoft.network/networkmanagers) to Event Hub
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to an Event Hub for Network Managers (microsoft.network/networkmanagers).

name: c2c0c6d8-007b-4a48-8d9b-3539bddd8e87
display_name: Microsoft Defender for AI Services should be enabled
description: Audit to see if Microsoft Defender for AI Services is enabled on the subscription.

name: c2cb4658-44dc-9d11-3dad-7c6802dd5ba3
display_name: Generate error messages
description: CMA_C1724 - Generate error messages

name: c2dd2a9a-8a20-4a9c-b8d6-f17ccc26939a
display_name: [Deprecated]: Show audit results from Windows VMs on which the specified services are not installed and 'Running'
description: This policy should only be used along with its corresponding deploy policy in an initiative. This definition allows Azure Policy to process the results of auditing Windows virtual machines on which the specified services are not installed and 'Running'. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: c2e7ca55-f62c-49b2-89a4-d41eb661d2f0
display_name: [Deprecated]: Ensure that '.NET Framework' version is the latest, if used as a part of the API app
description: This policy is not required since Azure App Service automatically updates and maintains the .NET Framework versions installed on the platform.

name: c2eabc28-1e5c-78a2-a712-7cc176c44c07
display_name: Implement a penetration testing methodology
description: CMA_0306 - Implement a penetration testing methodology

name: c30690a5-7bf3-467f-b0cd-ef5c7c7449cd
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1176 - Baseline Configuration
description: Microsoft implements this Configuration Management control

name: c349d81b-9985-44ae-a8da-ff98d108ede8
display_name: Azure Data Box jobs should enable double encryption for data at rest on the device
description: Enable a second layer of software-based encryption for data at rest on the device. The device is already protected via Advanced Encryption Standard 256-bit encryption for data at rest. This option adds a second layer of data encryption.

name: c3624673-d2ff-48e0-b28c-5de1c6767c3c
display_name: Configure Synapse Workspaces to use only Microsoft Entra identities for authentication during workspace creation
description: Require and reconfigure Synapse Workspaces to be created with Microsoft Entra-only authentication. This policy doesn't block local authentication from being re-enabled on resources after create. Consider using the 'Microsoft Entra-only authentication' initiative instead to require both. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/Synapse.

name: c36a325b-ae04-4863-ad4f-19c6678f8e08
display_name: Configure your Storage account to enable blob versioning
description: You can enable Blob storage versioning to automatically maintain previous versions of an object. When blob versioning is enabled, you can access earlier versions of a blob to recover your data if it's modified or deleted.

name: c3921d55-b741-4d16-8d56-7f16e99e6892
display_name: Protect your data with authentication requirements when exporting or uploading to a disk or snapshot.
description: When export/upload URL is used, the system checks if the user has an identity in Azure Active Directory and has necessary permissions to export/upload the data. Please refer to aka.ms/DisksAzureADAuth.

name: c39ba22d-4428-4149-b981-70acb31fc383
display_name: Azure Key Vault Managed HSM should have purge protection enabled
description: Malicious deletion of an Azure Key Vault Managed HSM can lead to permanent data loss. A malicious insider in your organization can potentially delete and purge Azure Key Vault Managed HSM. Purge protection protects you from insider attacks by enforcing a mandatory retention period for soft deleted Azure Key Vault Managed HSM. No one inside your organization or Microsoft will be able to purge your Azure Key Vault Managed HSM during the soft delete retention period.

name: c39e6fda-ae70-4891-a739-be7bba6d1062
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1389 - Information Spillage Response
description: Microsoft implements this Incident Response control

name: c3a8e4bd-b215-4c99-bd53-92f8d7ea65f7
display_name: Azure Application Gateway for Containers must have security policies
description: Ensures Application Gateway for Containers has at least one security policy configured

name: c3b3cc61-9c70-5d78-7f12-1aefcc477db7
display_name: Review security testing, training, and monitoring plans
description: CMA_C1754 - Review security testing, training, and monitoring plans

name: c3b65b63-09ec-4cb5-8028-7dd324d10eb0
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1390 - Information Spillage Response | Responsible Personnel
description: Microsoft implements this Incident Response control

name: c3b912c2-7f5b-47ac-bd52-8c85a7667961
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Volumes (microsoft.netapp/netappaccounts/capacitypools/volumes) to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for Volumes (microsoft.netapp/netappaccounts/capacitypools/volumes).

name: c3d20c29-b36d-48fe-808b-99a87530ad99
display_name: Azure Defender for Resource Manager should be enabled
description: Azure Defender for Resource Manager automatically monitors the resource management operations in your organization. Azure Defender detects threats and alerts you about suspicious activity. Learn more about the capabilities of Azure Defender for Resource Manager at https://aka.ms/defender-for-resource-manager . Enabling this Azure Defender plan results in charges. Learn about the pricing details per region on Security Center's pricing page: https://aka.ms/pricing-security-center .

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1865 - System of Records Notices And Privacy Act Statements | Public Website Publication

description: Use a customer-managed key to control the encryption at rest of the data stored in Azure Health Data Services FHIR Service when this is a regulatory or compliance requirement. Customer-managed keys also deliver double encryption by adding a second layer of encryption on top of the default one done with service-managed keys.

display_name: [Preview]: Container Registry should use a virtual network service endpoint

name: c4bc6f10-cb41-49eb-b000-d5ab82e2a091
display_name: Configure Cognitive Services accounts to use private DNS zones
description: Use private DNS zones to override the DNS resolution for a private endpoint. A private DNS zone links to your virtual network to resolve to Cognitive Services accounts. Learn more at: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2110097.

name: c4ccd607-702b-8ae6-8eeb-fc3339cd4b42
display_name: Define cryptographic use
description: CMA_0120 - Define cryptographic use

name: c4d441f8-f9d9-4a9e-9cef-e82117cb3eef
display_name: [Deprecated]: Managed identity should be used in your API App
description: Use a managed identity for enhanced authentication security. We recommend all customers who are still using API Apps to implement the built-in policy called 'App Service apps should use managed identity', which is scoped to include API apps in addition to Web Apps.

name: c4ebc54a-46e1-481a-bee2-d4411e95d828
display_name: [Deprecated]: Authentication should be enabled on your API app
description: Azure App Service Authentication is a feature that can prevent anonymous HTTP requests from reaching the API app, or authenticate those that have tokens before they reach the API app. We recommend all customers who are still using API apps to implement the built-in policy called 'App Service apps should have authentication enabled', which is scoped to include API apps in addition to Web apps.

name: c5110b6e-5272-4989-9935-59ad06fdf341
display_name: Azure Kubernetes Clusters should enable Container Storage Interface(CSI)
description: The Container Storage Interface (CSI) is a standard for exposing arbitrary block and file storage systems to containerized workloads on Azure Kubernetes Service. To learn more, https://aka.ms/aks-csi-driver

name: c520cefc-285f-40f3-86e2-2efc38ef1f64
display_name: Configure Batch accounts to disable public network access
description: Disabling public network access on a Batch account improves security by ensuring your Batch account can only be accessed from a private endpoint. Learn more about disabling public network access at https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/batch/private-connectivity.

name: c53f3123-d233-44a7-930b-f40d3bfeb7d6
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1600 - Developer Security Testing And Evaluation
description: Microsoft implements this System and Services Acquisition control

name: c5447c04-a4d7-4ba8-a263-c9ee321a6858
display_name: An activity log alert should exist for specific Policy operations
description: This policy audits specific Policy operations with no activity log alerts configured.

name: c5632066-946d-4766-9544-cd79bcc1286e
display_name: [Deprecated]: Configure Azure Media Services with private endpoints
description: This policy is deprecated because Media Services retirement. Learn more about policy definition deprecation at aka.ms/policydefdeprecation.

name: c5784049-959f-6067-420c-f4cefae93076
display_name: Coordinate contingency plans with related plans
description: CMA_0086 - Coordinate contingency plans with related plans

name: c58e083e-7982-4e24-afdc-be14d312389e
display_name: [Preview]: Multi-User Authorization (MUA) must be enabled for Backup Vaults.
description: This policy audits if Multi-User Authorization (MUA) is enabled for Backup Vaults. MUA helps in securing your Backup Vaults by adding an additional layer of protection to critical operations. To learn more, visit https://aka.ms/mua-for-bv.

name: c5a62eb0-c65a-4220-8a4d-f70dd4ca95dd
display_name: Configure Azure Defender to be enabled on SQL managed instances
description: Enable Azure Defender on your Azure SQL Managed Instances to detect anomalous activities indicating unusual and potentially harmful attempts to access or exploit databases.

name: c5b85cba-6e6f-4de4-95e1-f0233cd712ac
display_name: Audit Windows machines that have the specified applications installed
description: Requires that prerequisites are deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol. Machines are non-compliant if the application name is found in any of the following registry paths: HKLM:SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall, HKLM:SOFTWARE\Wow6432node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall, HKCU:Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall.

name: c5ecf495-6caa-445c-b431-04fda56c555a
display_name: Enable logging by category group for ExpressRoute circuits (microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits) to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for ExpressRoute circuits (microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits).

name: c5f34731-7ab9-42ff-922d-ef4920068b74
display_name: Azure Health Data Services de-identification service should disable public network access
description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that the resource isn't exposed on the public internet. You can limit exposure of your resources by creating private endpoints instead.

name: c5f56ac6-4bb2-4086-bc41-ad76344ba2c2
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1408 - Maintenance Tools | Prevent Unauthorized Removal
description: Microsoft implements this Maintenance control

display_name: [Deprecated]: Deploy prerequisites to audit Windows VMs that contain certificates expiring within the specified number of days
description: This policy creates a Guest Configuration assignment to audit Windows virtual machines that contain certificates expiring within the specified number of days. It also creates a system-assigned managed identity and deploys the VM extension for Guest Configuration. This policy should only be used along with its corresponding audit policy in an initiative. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: c600af08-49ff-4f7a-b5c9-0686749387b7
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Container instances (microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups) to Storage
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Storage Account for Container instances (microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups).

name: c6108469-57ee-4666-af7e-79ba61c7ae0c

description: Microsoft implements this System and Information Integrity control

name: c6283572-73bb-4deb-bf2c-7a2b8f7462cb
display_name: SQL server-targeted autoprovisioning should be enabled for SQL servers on machines plan
description: To ensure your SQL VMs and Arc-enabled SQL Servers are protected, ensure the SQL-targeted Azure Monitoring Agent is configured to automatically deploy. This is also necessary if you've previously configured autoprovisioning of the Microsoft Monitoring Agent, as that component is being deprecated. Learn more: https://aka.ms/SQLAMAMigration

name: c633f6a2-7f8b-4d9e-9456-02f0f04f5505
display_name: Audit Windows machines that are not set to the specified time zone
description: Requires that prerequisites are deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol. Machines are non-compliant if the value of the property StandardName in WMI class Win32_TimeZone does not match the selected time zone for the policy parameter.

name: c648fbbb-591c-4acd-b465-ce9b176ca173
display_name: Audit Windows machines that do not have the specified Windows PowerShell execution policy
description: Requires that prerequisites are deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol. Machines are non-compliant if  the Windows PowerShell command Get-ExecutionPolicy returns a value other than what was selected in the policy parameter.

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1190 - Configuration Change Control

display_name: Configure App Service app slots to disable public network access
description: Disable public network access for your App Services so that it is not accessible over the public internet. This can reduce data leakage risks. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/app-service-private-endpoint.

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1819 - Accounting of Disclosures

name: c707daa0-b93b-454d-9e1e-8ac59866316c
display_name: Maps account should not process data globally.
description: This policy restricts the data processing locations you can add to your Azure Maps accounts. Use to enforce your geo-compliance requirements.

display_name: Function apps should have authentication enabled
description: Azure App Service Authentication is a feature that can prevent anonymous HTTP requests from reaching the Function app, or authenticate those that have tokens before they reach the Function app.

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1353 - Incident Response Training

name: c7d3d99c-fd9a-438d-8dc5-e38568f22c0e
display_name: Configure Function app slots to disable local authentication for SCM sites
description: Disabling local authentication methods for SCM sites improves security by ensuring that function app slots exclusively require Microsoft Entra identities for authentication. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/app-service-disable-basic-auth.

name: c7d3e3a0-533b-4ad2-9458-9b28f465ad36
display_name: Configure Function apps to disable local authentication for FTP deployments
description: Disabling local authentication methods for FTP deployments improves security by ensuring that function apps exclusively require Microsoft Entra identities for authentication. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/app-service-disable-basic-auth.

display_name: [Deprecated]: Deploy a VMInsights Data Collection Rule and Data Collection Rule Association for all the VMSS in the Resource Group
description: Deploy a Data Collection Rule for VMInsights and deploy Data Collection Rule Association for all the VMSSs in the Resource Group. The policy asks if enabling of Processes and Dependencies is required and accordingly creates the DCR. Please refer to this link for newer experience migration: https://aka.ms/vminsights-dcrOnboarding

name: c7f49635-e3f0-4986-b072-90d0c7c3d4cd
display_name: Azure Kubernetes Service clusters should be a member of an Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager.
description: Detect and report any AKS clusters that are not members of an Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager. To learn more, visit https://aka.ms/kubernetes-fleet/policy

name: c7fddb0e-3f44-8635-2b35-dc6b8e740b7c
display_name: Identify and manage downstream information exchanges
description: CMA_0298 - Identify and manage downstream information exchanges

name: c8343d2f-fdc9-4a97-b76f-fc71d1163bfc
display_name: [Deprecated]: Email notifications to admins should be enabled in SQL server advanced data security settings
description: Audit that 'email notification to admins and subscription owners' is enabled in the SQL server advanced threat protection settings. This ensures that any detections of anomalous activities on SQL server are reported as soon as possible to the admins.

name: c84e5349-db6d-4769-805e-e14037dab9b5
display_name: Deploy Diagnostic Settings for Batch Account to Log Analytics workspace
description: Deploys the diagnostic settings for Batch Account to stream to a regional Log Analytics workspace when any Batch Account which is missing this diagnostic settings is created or updated.

name: c854b0f0-02d0-4f94-9b42-fd175fbd4d49
display_name: Deploy - Configure IoT Central with private endpoints
description: A private endpoint is a private IP address allocated inside a customer-owned virtual network via which an Azure resource is reachable. This policy deploys a private endpoint for your IoT Central to allow services inside your virtual network to reach IoT Central without requiring traffic to be sent to IoT Central's public endpoint.

name: c85538c1-b527-4ce4-bdb4-1dabcb3fd90d
display_name: [Deprecated]: API App should only be accessible over HTTPS
description: Use of HTTPS ensures server/service authentication and protects data in transit from network layer eavesdropping attacks.

name: c859b78a-a128-4376-a838-e97ce6625d16
display_name: Configure SQL Virtual Machines to automatically install Microsoft Defender for SQL and DCR with a Log Analytics workspace
description: Microsoft Defender for SQL collects events from the agent and uses them to provide security alerts and tailored hardening tasks (recommendations). Create a resource group, a Data Collection Rule and Log Analytics workspace in the same region as the machine.

name: c89ba09f-2e0f-44d0-8095-65b05bd151ef
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1470 - Emergency Shutoff
description: Microsoft implements this Physical and Environmental Protection control

name: c8aa992d-76b7-7ca0-07b3-31a58d773fa9
display_name: Employ automated training environment
description: CMA_C1357 - Employ automated training environment

name: c8abcef9-fc26-482f-b8db-5fa60ee4586d
display_name: [Deprecated]: Show audit results from Windows VMs configurations in 'Security Options - Interactive Logon'
description: This policy should only be used along with its corresponding deploy policy in an initiative. This definition allows Azure Policy to process the results of auditing Windows virtual machines with non-compliant settings in Group Policy category: 'Security Options - Interactive Logon'. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: c8acafaf-3d23-44d1-9624-978ef0f8652c
display_name: API endpoints that are unused should be disabled and removed from the Azure API Management service
description: As a security best practice, API endpoints that haven't received traffic for 30 days are considered unused and should be removed from the Azure API Management service. Keeping unused API endpoints may pose a security risk to your organization. These may be APIs that should have been deprecated from the Azure API Management service but may have been accidentally left active. Such APIs typically do not receive the most up to date security coverage.

name: c8cc2f85-e019-4065-9fa3-5e6a2b2dde56
display_name: Azure HDInsight should use private link
description: Azure Private Link lets you connect your virtual networks to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. The Private Link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. By mapping private endpoints to Azure HDInsight clusters, you can reduce data leakage risks. Learn more about private links at: https://aka.ms/hdi.pl.

name: c9121abf-e698-4ee9-b1cf-71ee528ff07f
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1018 - Account Management | Role-Based Schemes
description: Microsoft implements this Access Control control

name: c9299215-ae47-4f50-9c54-8a392f68a052
display_name: Public network access should be disabled for MySQL flexible servers
description: Disabling the public network access property improves security by ensuring your Azure Database for MySQL flexible servers can only be accessed from a private endpoint. This configuration strictly disables access from any public address space outside of Azure IP range and denies all logins that match IP or virtual network-based firewall rules.

name: c95b54ad-0614-4633-ab29-104b01235cbf
display_name: Virtual Machine should have TrustedLaunch enabled
description: Enable TrustedLaunch on Virtual Machine for enhanced security, use VM SKU (Gen 2) that supports TrustedLaunch. To learn more about TrustedLaunch, visit https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/trusted-launch

name: c95c74d9-38fe-4f0d-af86-0c7d626a315c
display_name: Resource logs in Data Lake Analytics should be enabled
description: Audit enabling of resource logs. This enables you to recreate activity trails to use for investigation purposes; when a security incident occurs or when your network is compromised

name: c961dac9-5916-42e8-8fb1-703148323994
display_name: [Deprecated]: Show audit results from Windows VMs configurations in 'User Rights Assignment'
description: This policy should only be used along with its corresponding deploy policy in an initiative. This definition allows Azure Policy to process the results of auditing Windows virtual machines with non-compliant settings in Group Policy category: 'User Rights Assignment'. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: c9623da8-5301-401e-9ca8-69396833b6f3
display_name: Audit - Allowed Cognitive Services Kinds
description: Cognitive Services kinds based on catalog.

name: c96f3246-4382-4264-bf6b-af0b35e23c3c
display_name: [Deprecated]: Deploy prerequisites to audit Windows VMs with a pending reboot
description: This policy creates a Guest Configuration assignment to audit Windows virtual machines with a pending reboot. It also creates a system-assigned managed identity and deploys the VM extension for Guest Configuration. This policy should only be used along with its corresponding audit policy in an initiative. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: c981fa70-2e58-8141-1457-e7f62ebc2ade
display_name: Document organizational access agreements
description: CMA_0192 - Document organizational access agreements

name: c99ce9c1-ced7-4c3e-aca0-10e69ce0cb02
display_name: Deploy - Configure Azure IoT Hubs to use private DNS zones
description: Azure Private DNS provides a reliable, secure DNS service to manage and resolve domain names in a virtual network without the need to add a custom DNS solution. You can use private DNS zones to override the DNS resolution by using your own custom domain names for a private endpoint. This policy deploys a private DNS Zone for IoT Hub private endpoints.

name: c9ae938d-3d6f-4466-b7c3-351761d9c890
display_name: [Deprecated]: Configure Association to link Arc machines to user-defined Microsoft Defender for Cloud Data Collection Rule
description: This policy is deprecated as part of Microsoft Defender for Cloud updated strategy. As part of this strategy, Azure Monitor agent is no longer required to receive Defender for Servers security features, but is required for Defender for SQL Server on machines. For more information visit: https://aka.ms/MdcAgentStrategy. Configure Arc machines to automatically create an association with the user-defined data collection rule for Microsoft Defender for Cloud.

name: c9b2ae08-09e2-4f0e-bb43-b60bf0135bdf
display_name: [Preview]: Configure supported Windows virtual machine scale sets to automatically install the Guest Attestation extension
description: Configure supported Windows virtual machines scale sets to automatically install the Guest Attestation extension to allow Azure Security Center to proactively attest and monitor the boot integrity. Boot integrity is attested via Remote Attestation.

name: c9c29499-c1d1-4195-99bd-2ec9e3a9dc89
display_name: Deploy Diagnostic Settings for Network Security Groups
description: This policy automatically deploys diagnostic settings to network security groups. A storage account with name '{storagePrefixParameter}{NSGLocation}' will be automatically created.

name: c9d007d0-c057-4772-b18c-01e546713bcd
display_name: Storage accounts should allow access from trusted Microsoft services
description: Some Microsoft services that interact with storage accounts operate from networks that can't be granted access through network rules. To help this type of service work as intended, allow the set of trusted Microsoft services to bypass the network rules. These services will then use strong authentication to access the storage account.

name: c9ddb292-b203-4738-aead-18e2716e858f
display_name: Configure Microsoft Defender for Containers to be enabled
description: Microsoft Defender for Containers provides hardening, vulnerability assessment and run-time protections for your Azure, hybrid, and multi-cloud Kubernetes environments.

name: ca05d7f2-6625-4cc3-a65a-4931b45ff139
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Bot Services (microsoft.botservice/botservices) to Event Hub
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to an Event Hub for Bot Services (microsoft.botservice/botservices).

name: ca09affa-60d6-4cef-9037-b7372e1ac44f
display_name: Enable logging by category group for microsoft.network/vpngateways to Event Hub
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to an Event Hub for microsoft.network/vpngateways.

name: ca610c1d-041c-4332-9d88-7ed3094967c7
display_name: App Configuration should use private link
description: Azure Private Link lets you connect your virtual network to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. The private link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. By mapping private endpoints to your app configuration instances instead of the entire service, you'll also be protected against data leakage risks. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/appconfig/private-endpoint.

name: ca6d7878-3189-1833-4620-6c7254ed1607
display_name: Obtain continuous monitoring plan for security controls
description: CMA_C1577 - Obtain continuous monitoring plan for security controls

name: ca748dfe-3e28-1d18-4221-89aea30aa0a5
display_name: Identify status of individual users
description: CMA_C1316 - Identify status of individual users

name: ca817e41-e85a-4783-bc7f-dc532d36235e
display_name: Configure Windows virtual machines to run Azure Monitor Agent using system-assigned managed identity
description: Automate the deployment of Azure Monitor Agent extension on your Windows virtual machines for collecting telemetry data from the guest OS. This policy will install the extension if the OS and region are supported and system-assigned managed identity is enabled, and skip install otherwise. Learn more: https://aka.ms/AMAOverview.

name: ca85ef9a-741d-461d-8b7a-18c2da82c666
display_name: Azure Web Application Firewall on Azure Application Gateway should have request body inspection enabled
description: Ensure that Web Application Firewalls associated to Azure Application Gateways have Request body inspection enabled. This allows the WAF to inspect properties within the HTTP body that may not be evaluated in the HTTP headers, cookies, or URI.

name: ca88aadc-6e2b-416c-9de2-5a0f01d1693f
display_name: Linux virtual machines should enable Azure Disk Encryption or EncryptionAtHost.
description: Although a virtual machine's OS and data disks are encrypted-at-rest by default using platform managed keys; resource disks (temp disks), data caches, and data flowing between Compute and Storage resources are not encrypted. Use Azure Disk Encryption or EncryptionAtHost to remediate. Visit https://aka.ms/diskencryptioncomparison to compare encryption offerings. This policy requires two prerequisites to be deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

name: ca91455f-eace-4f96-be59-e6e2c35b4816
display_name: Managed disks should be double encrypted with both platform-managed and customer-managed keys
description: High security sensitive customers who are concerned of the risk associated with any particular encryption algorithm, implementation, or key being compromised can opt for additional layer of encryption using a different encryption algorithm/mode at the infrastructure layer using platform managed encryption keys. The disk encryption sets are required to use double encryption. Learn more at https://aka.ms/disks-doubleEncryption.

name: ca94b046-45e2-444f-a862-dc8ce262a516
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1035 - Least Privilege | Authorize Access To Security Functions
description: Microsoft implements this Access Control control

name: ca950cd7-02f7-422e-8c23-91ff40f169c1
display_name: Azure Virtual Desktop service should use private link
description: Using Azure Private Link with your Azure Virtual Desktop resources can improve security and keep your data safe. Learn more about private links at: https://aka.ms/avdprivatelink.

name: ca9a4469-d6df-4ab2-a42f-1213c396f0ec
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1243 - Contingency Planning Policy And Procedures
description: Microsoft implements this Contingency Planning control

name: cac9e1c5-c3cb-47fa-8d4c-88b8559262d2
display_name: Enable logging by category group for microsoft.network/p2svpngateways to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for microsoft.network/p2svpngateways.

name: cadd9445-aeb8-4ee4-b505-c279db2f737f
display_name: Configure AKS clusters to automatically join the specified Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager
description: Detect and ensure that AKS clusters join a given Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager. Optionally, select a look-up tag to specify what fleet update group to join. To learn more, visit https://aka.ms/kubernetes-fleet/policy

name: cae7c12e-764b-4c87-841a-fdc6675d196f
display_name: App Service app slots should not have CORS configured to allow every resource to access your apps
description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) should not allow all domains to access your app. Allow only required domains to interact with your app.

name: caf2d518-f029-4f6b-833b-d7081702f253
display_name: Windows machines should meet requirements for 'Security Options - Microsoft Network Server'
description: Windows machines should have the specified Group Policy settings in the category 'Security Options - Microsoft Network Server' for disabling SMB v1 server. This policy requires that the Guest Configuration prerequisites have been deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

name: cafc6c3c-5fc5-4c5e-a99b-a0ccb1d34eff
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1306 - User Identification And Authentication | Network Access To Privileged Accounts - Replay...
description: Microsoft implements this Identification and Authentication control

name: cb26889c-214c-4b29-811e-6f2109a1959f
display_name: Azure Maps Accounts should use private link.
description: Azure Private Link lets you connect your virtual networks to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. The Private Link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. By mapping private endpoints to Maps Account, you can reduce data leakage risks.

name: cb3738a6-82a2-4a18-b87b-15217b9deff4
display_name: Azure Synapse Workspace SQL Server should be running TLS version 1.2 or newer
description: Setting TLS version to 1.2 or newer improves security by ensuring your Azure Synapse workspace SQL server can only be accessed from clients using TLS 1.2 or newer. Using versions of TLS less than 1.2 is not recommended since they have well documented security vulnerabilities.

name: cb510bfd-1cba-4d9f-a230-cb0976f4bb71
display_name: App Service apps should have remote debugging turned off
description: Remote debugging requires inbound ports to be opened on an App Service app. Remote debugging should be turned off.

name: cb790345-a51f-43de-934e-98dbfaf9dca5
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1486 - Alternate Work Site
description: Microsoft implements this Physical and Environmental Protection control

name: cb8841d4-9d13-7292-1d06-ba4d68384681
display_name: Perform a business impact assessment and application criticality assessment
description: CMA_0386 - Perform a business impact assessment and application criticality assessment

name: cbb2be76-4891-430b-95a7-ca0b0a3d1300

description: Azure Data Explorer Clusters can be configured to be Zone Redundant or not. An Azure Data Explorer Cluster is considered Zone Redundant if it has at least two entries in its zones array. This policy helps ensure the your Azure Data Explorer Clusters are Zone Redundant.

description: Configures flow log for specific virtual network. It will allow to log information about IP traffic flowing through an virtual network. Flow log helps to identify unknown or undesired traffic, verify network isolation and compliance with enterprise access rules, analyze network flows from compromised IPs and network interfaces.

name: cd794351-e536-40f4-9750-503a463d8cad
display_name: Configure Function apps to disable public network access
description: Disable public network access for your Function apps so that it is not accessible over the public internet. This can reduce data leakage risks. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/app-service-private-endpoint.

name: cd870362-211d-4cad-9ad9-11e5ea4ebbc1
display_name: Public network access should be disabled for IoT Central
description: To improve the security of IoT Central, ensure that it isn't exposed to the public internet and can only be accessed from a private endpoint. Disable the public network access property as described in https://aka.ms/iotcentral-restrict-public-access. This option disables access from any public address space outside the Azure IP range, and denies all logins that match IP or virtual network-based firewall rules. This reduces data leakage risks.

The Private Link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. By mapping private endpoints to your Event Grid namespace instead of the entire service, you'll also be protected against data leakage risks. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/aeg-ns-privateendpoints.

For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

Configuring geo-redundant storage for backup is only allowed during server create.

description:
Microsoft Defender for Storage is an Azure-native layer of security intelligence that detects potential threats to your storage accounts.
This policy will enable all Defender for Storage capabilities; Activity Monitoring, Malware Scanning and Sensitive Data Threat Detection. To learn more about Defender for Storage capabilities and benefits, visit aka.ms/DefenderForStorage.

If your registry doesn't have network rules configured, it will appear in the unhealthy resources. Learn more about Container Registry network rules here: https://aka.ms/acr/privatelink, https://aka.ms/acr/portal/public-network and https://aka.ms/acr/vnet.

Enforcing SSL connections between your database server and your client applications helps protect against 'man in the middle' attacks by encrypting the data stream between the server and your application. This configuration enforces that SSL is always enabled for accessing your database server.

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1030 - Information Flow Enforcement | Physical / Logical Separation Of Information Flows

display_name: Establish a risk management strategy
description: CMA_0258 - Establish a risk management strategy

name: d367bd60-64ca-4364-98ea-276775bddd94
display_name: [Preview]: Assign Built-In User-Assigned Managed Identity to Virtual Machines
description: Create and assign a built-in user-assigned managed identity or assign a pre-created user-assigned managed identity at scale to virtual machines. For more detailed documentation, visit aka.ms/managedidentitypolicy.

display_name: Azure Defender for SQL should be enabled for unprotected PostgreSQL flexible servers
description: Audit PostgreSQL flexible servers without Advanced Data Security

display_name: Deploy - Configure Azure Event Grid domains to use private DNS zones
description: Use private DNS zones to override the DNS resolution for a private endpoint. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/privatednszone.

display_name: [Deprecated]: Deploy prerequisites to audit Windows VMs on which the DSC configuration is not compliant
description: This policy creates a Guest Configuration assignment to audit Windows VMs on which the Desired State Configuration (DSC) configuration is not compliant. This policy is only applicable to machines with WMF 4 and above. It also creates a system-assigned managed identity and deploys the VM extension for Guest Configuration. This policy should only be used along with its corresponding audit policy in an initiative. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: d38fc420-0735-4ef3-ac11-c806f651a570
display_name: Long-term geo-redundant backup should be enabled for Azure SQL Databases
description: This policy audits any Azure SQL Database with long-term geo-redundant backup not enabled.

name: d3903bdf-ab85-4cce-85d3-2934d77629d4
display_name: [Preview]: Virtual Machine Scale Sets should be Zone Resilient
description: Virtual Machine Scale Sets can be configured to be either Zone Aligned, Zone Redundant, or neither. Virtual Machine Scale Sets that have exactly one entry in their zones array are considered Zone Aligned. In contrast, Virtual Machine Scale Sets with 3 or more entries in their zones array and a capacity of at least 3 are recognized as Zone Redundant. This policy helps identify and enforce these resilience configurations.

name: d39620a4-95c6-4d4f-8aa4-83c0c6a2c640
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1818 - Accounting of Disclosures

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1641 - Transmission Confidentiality And Integrity | Cryptographic Or Alternate Physical Protection

display_name: Enable logging by category group for microsoft.servicenetworking/trafficcontrollers to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for microsoft.servicenetworking/trafficcontrollers.

name: d3b823c9-e0fc-4453-9fb2-8213b7338523
display_name: Audit Linux machines that don't have the specified applications installed
description: Requires that prerequisites are deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol. Machines are non-compliant if the Chef InSpec resource indicates that one or more of the packages provided by the parameter are not installed.

name: d3ba9c42-9dd5-441a-957c-274031c750c0
display_name: Configure Azure Log Analytics workspaces to disable public network access for log ingestion and querying
description: Improve workspace security by blocking log ingestion and querying from public networks. Only private-link connected networks will be able to ingest and query logs on this workspace. Learn more at https://aka.ms/AzMonPrivateLink#configure-log-analytics.

name: d3bf4251-0818-42db-950b-afd5b25a51c2
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1249 - Contingency Plan

name: d3d1e68e-49d4-4b56-acff-93cef644b432
display_name: [Deprecated]: Configure Azure Defender for container registries to be enabled
description: Azure Defender for container registries provides vulnerability scanning of any images pulled within the last 30 days, pushed to your registry, or imported, and exposes detailed findings per image.

name: d3e11828-02c8-40d2-a518-ad01508bb4d7
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Azure Cache for Redis (microsoft.cache/redis) to Storage
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Storage Account for Azure Cache for Redis (microsoft.cache/redis).

name: d3ee5dcf-0c6d-49ab-aee4-f250583a7bdc
display_name: [Preview]: Service Bus should be Zone Redundant
description: Service Bus can be configured to be Zone Redundant or not. When the 'zoneRedundant' property is set to 'false' for a Service Bus, it means it is not configured for Zone Redundancy. This policy identifies and enforces the Zone Redundancy configuration for Service Bus instances.

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1562 - Allocation Of Resources

name: d416745a-506c-48b6-8ab1-83cb814bcaa3

description: This policy audits any virtual machine connected to a virtual network that is not approved.

display_name: Protect wireless access
description: CMA_0411 - Protect wireless access

name: d45520cb-31ca-44ba-8da2-fcf914608544
display_name: Configure Azure AI Services resources  to disable local key access (disable local authentication)
description: Key access (local authentication) is recommended to be disabled for security. Azure OpenAI Studio, typically used in development/testing, requires key access and will not function if key access is disabled. After disabling, Microsoft Entra ID becomes the only access method, which allows maintaining minimum privilege principle and granular control. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/AI/auth

name: d4558451-e16a-4d2d-a066-fe12a6282bb9
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1383 - Incident Response Plan
description: Microsoft implements this Incident Response control

name: d461a302-a187-421a-89ac-84acdb4edc04
display_name: Managed disks should use a specific set of disk encryption sets for the customer-managed key encryption
description: Requiring a specific set of disk encryption sets to be used with managed disks give you control over the keys used for encryption at rest. You are able to select the allowed encrypted sets and all others are rejected when attached to a disk. Learn more at https://aka.ms/disks-cmk.

name: d461dd50-c8fb-4ccb-93bf-61f53b44e54d
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1742 - Critical Infrastructure Plan
description: Microsoft implements this Program Management control

name: d472d2c9-d6a3-4500-9f5f-b15f123005aa
display_name: Windows machines should meet requirements for 'Security Options - Interactive Logon'
description: Windows machines should have the specified Group Policy settings in the category 'Security Options - Interactive Logon' for displaying last user name and requiring ctrl-alt-del. This policy requires that the Guest Configuration prerequisites have been deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

description: Automatically prevent installation of the legacy Log Analytics Agent as the final step of migrating from legacy agents to Azure Monitor Agent. After you have uninstalled existing legacy extensions, this policy will deny all future installations of the legacy agent extension on Linux virtual machines. Learn more: https://aka.ms/migratetoAMA

display_name: Enable logging by category group for Data Lake Analytics (microsoft.datalakeanalytics/accounts) to Event Hub

This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to an Event Hub for Data Lake Analytics (microsoft.datalakeanalytics/accounts).

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1112 - Response To Audit Processing Failures
description: Microsoft implements this Audit and Accountability control

name: d5448c98-e503-4fdd-bcd2-784960c00d04
display_name: API Management policies should inherit parent scope policies using <base />
description: Ensures that every API Management policy includes the <base /> tag at the beginning of each policy section - <inbound>, <outbound>, <backend>, and <on-error> - to inherit policies from parent scopes. Omitting <base /> can lead to bypassing shared rules such as authentication, logging, rate limits, and other critical controls. Learn more: https://aka.ms/apim/policies/how-to

name: d550e854-df1a-4de9-bf44-cd894b39a95e
display_name: Azure Monitor Logs for Application Insights should be linked to a Log Analytics workspace
description: Link the Application Insights component to a Log Analytics workspace for logs encryption. Customer-managed keys are commonly required to meet regulatory compliance and for more control over the access to your data in Azure Monitor. Linking your component to a Log Analytics workspace that's enabled with a customer-managed key, ensures that your Application Insights logs meet this compliance requirement, see https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/customer-managed-keys.

name: d558e1a6-296d-4fbb-81a5-ea25822639f6
display_name: Azure NetApp Files Volumes should not use NFSv3 protocol type
description: Disallow the use of NFSv3 protocol type to prevent unsecure access to volumes. NFSv4.1 with Kerberos protocol should be used to access NFS volumes to ensure data integrity and encryption.

name: d55b81e1-984f-4a96-acab-fae204e3ca7f
display_name: [Deprecated]: Deploy Dependency agent for Linux virtual machines with Azure Monitoring Agent settings
description: This policy definition is deprecated following the planned retirement of the Dependency Agent on June 30, 2028. The Dependency Agent does not have a replacement, thus no replacement policy is available. For more information, see https://aka.ms/dependencyagentretirement.

name: d56a5a7c-72d7-42bc-8ceb-3baf4c0eae03
display_name: Deploy Diagnostic Settings for Data Lake Analytics to Log Analytics workspace
description: Deploys the diagnostic settings for Data Lake Analytics to stream to a regional Log Analytics workspace when any Data Lake Analytics which is missing this diagnostic settings is created or updated.

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1585 - Security Engineering Principles
description: Microsoft implements this System and Services Acquisition control

name: d5c37ce1-5f52-4523-b949-f19bf945b73a
display_name: Configure Linux Arc Machines to be associated with a Data Collection Rule or a Data Collection Endpoint
description: Deploy Association to link Linux Arc machines to the specified Data Collection Rule or the specified Data Collection Endpoint. The list of locations are updated over time as support is increased.

name: d5f959a0-1808-4ebd-9a13-79237246f96f
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1861 - Privacy Notice | Real-Time or Layered Notice
description: Microsoft implements this Transparency control

name: d61880dc-6e38-4f2a-a30c-3406a98f8220
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1667 - System And Information Integrity Policy And Procedures
description: Microsoft implements this System and Information Integrity control

name: d627d7c6-ded5-481a-8f2e-7e16b1e6faf6
display_name: Deploy - Configure IoT Central to use private DNS zones
description: Azure Private DNS provides a reliable, secure DNS service to manage and resolve domain names in a virtual network without the need to add a custom DNS solution. You can use private DNS zones to override the DNS resolution by using your own custom domain names for a private endpoint. This policy deploys a private DNS Zone for IoT Central private endpoints.

name: d62cfe2b-3ab0-4d41-980d-76803b58ca65
display_name: [Deprecated]: Log Analytics agent health issues should be resolved on your machines
description: Security Center uses the Log Analytics agent, formerly known as the Microsoft Monitoring Agent (MMA). To make sure your virtual machines are successfully monitored, you need to make sure the agent is installed on the virtual machines and properly collects security events to the configured workspace.

name: d630429d-e763-40b1-8fba-d20ba7314afb
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1150 - Security Assessments | External Organizations
description: Microsoft implements this Security Assessment and Authorization control

name: d639b3af-a535-4bef-8dcf-15078cddf5e2
display_name: App Service app slots should have resource logs enabled
description: Audit enabling of resource logs on the app. This enables you to recreate activity trails for investigation purposes if a security incident occurs or your network is compromised.

name: d63edb4a-c612-454d-b47d-191a724fcbf0
display_name: Event Hub should use a virtual network service endpoint
description: This policy audits any Event Hub not configured to use a virtual network service endpoint.

name: d6545c6b-dd9d-4265-91e6-0b451e2f1c50
display_name: App Service Environment should have TLS 1.0 and 1.1 disabled
description: TLS 1.0 and 1.1 are out-of-date protocols that do not support modern cryptographic algorithms. Disabling inbound TLS 1.0 and 1.1 traffic helps secure apps in an App Service Environment.

name: d6588149-9f06-462c-a076-56aece45b5ba
display_name: [Preview]: Azure Backup Vaults should use customer-managed keys for encrypting backup data. Also an option to enforce Infra Encryption.
description: This policy follows the 'effect' if Encryption Settings are enabled for Backup vaults in the scope. Additionally, option to check if Backup Vault also has Infrastructure Encryption enabled. Learn more at https://aka.ms/az-backup-vault-encryption-at-rest-with-cmk. Please note that when 'Deny' effect is used, it would need you to enable Encryption Settings on the existing Backup Vaults in order to allow other update operations on the vault go through.

name: d66025f8-6cad-476a-bbfb-3b66ae33f6ff
display_name: Storage account should restrict IP rules in storage account firewall settings.
description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. IP Rules in Storage Account Firewalls are restricted.

display_name: Define organizational requirements for cryptographic key management
description: CMA_0123 - Define organizational requirements for cryptographic key management

name: d6653f89-7cb5-24a4-9d71-51581038231b
display_name: Reauthenticate or terminate a user session
description: CMA_0421 - Reauthenticate or terminate a user session

name: d6759c02-b87f-42b7-892e-71b3f471d782
display_name: Azure AI Services resources should use Azure Private Link
description: Azure Private Link lets you connect your virtual network to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. The Private Link platform reduces data leakage risks by handling the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. Learn more about private links at: https://aka.ms/AzurePrivateLink/Overview

name: d6976a08-d969-4df2-bb38-29556c2eb48a
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1549 - Vulnerability Scanning
description: Microsoft implements this Risk Assessment control

name: d69b1763-b96d-40b8-a2d9-ca31e9fd0d3e
display_name: [Deprecated]: Log Analytics extension should be installed on your Windows Azure Arc machines
description: This policy definition is deprecated because OMS Agent was deprecated on August 31, 2024. While there is not a specific replacement policy, we have various policies available based on the VM setup that can be found under Azure Monitor Agent/DCRA Windows. Learn more about policy definition deprecation at aka.ms/policydefdeprecation.

name: d6c69680-54f0-4349-af10-94dd05f4225e
display_name: Windows machines should meet requirements for 'Security Options - Microsoft Network Client'
description: Windows machines should have the specified Group Policy settings in the category 'Security Options - Microsoft Network Client' for Microsoft network client/server and SMB v1. This policy requires that the Guest Configuration prerequisites have been deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

name: d6eeba80-df61-4de5-8772-bc1b7852ba6b
display_name: Configure Azure Arc Private Link Scopes with private endpoints
description: Private endpoints connect your virtual networks to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. By mapping private endpoints to Azure Arc Private Link Scopes, you can reduce data leakage risks. Learn more about private links at: https://aka.ms/arc/privatelink.

name: d6f6f560-14b7-49a4-9fc8-d2c3a9807868
display_name: [Preview]: Immutability must be enabled for Recovery Services vaults
description: This policy audits if the immutable vaults property is enabled for Recovery Services vaults in the scope. This helps protect your backup data from being deleted before its intended expiry. Learn more at https://aka.ms/AB-ImmutableVaults.

name: d79ab062-dffd-4318-8344-f70de714c0bc
display_name: [Deprecated]: App Service should disable public network access
description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that the app service is not exposed on the public internet. Creating private endpoints can limit exposure of the app service. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/app-service-private-endpoint.

name: d7c1ecc3-2980-a079-1569-91aec8ac4a77

description: This policy should only be used along with its corresponding deploy policy in an initiative. This definition allows Azure Policy to process the results of auditing Windows Server virtual machines on which Windows Serial Console is not enabled. For more information on Guest Configuration policies, please visit https://aka.ms/gcpol

name: d7d59290-3ee5-4c1b-b408-c38b21799aea
display_name: Enable logging by category group for microsoft.managednetworkfabric/networkdevices to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for microsoft.managednetworkfabric/networkdevices.

name: d7d66d05-bf34-4555-b5f2-8b749def4098

name: d813ace4-60e4-4103-9f8e-28cc81393f36
display_name: Function app slots should have local authentication methods disabled for FTP deployments
description: Disabling local authentication methods for FTP deployments improves security by ensuring that function app slots exclusively require Microsoft Entra identities for authentication. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/app-service-disable-basic-auth.

name: d82101f3-f3ce-4fc5-8708-4c09f4009546
display_name: IoT Hub device provisioning service instances should disable public network access
description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that IoT Hub device provisioning service instance isn't exposed on the public internet. Creating private endpoints can limit exposure of the IoT Hub device provisioning instances. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/iotdpsvnet.

name: d82527a7-91cd-409f-b96e-049600b16b9e
display_name: Durable Task schedulers should not allow open IP allowlists
description: Deny Durable Task schedulers that include 0.0.0.0/0 in their IP allowlist to prevent exposure to the public internet. Remove the open entry so that only trusted networks can reach the scheduler.

name: d8350d4c-9314-400b-288f-20ddfce04fbd
display_name: Define and enforce the limit of concurrent sessions
description: CMA_C1050 - Define and enforce the limit of concurrent sessions

display_name: Configure a private DNS Zone ID for blob_secondary groupID

name: d85c6833-7d33-4cf5-a915-aaa2de84405f
display_name: Configure Container registries with private endpoints
description: Private endpoints connect your virtual network to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. By mapping private endpoints to your premium container registry resources, you can reduce data leakage risks. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/privateendpoints and https://aka.ms/acr/private-link.

name: d8624de8-47fe-47c0-bea0-2d8329b628fe
display_name: Enable logging by category group for microsoft.network/vpngateways to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for microsoft.network/vpngateways.

name: d8659d5a-a3bd-444d-98ea-570bceb568cf
display_name: [Preview]: Configure backup for Azure Files Shares with a given tag to an existing recovery services vault in the same location
description: Enforce backup for all Azure Files by backing them up to an existing central Recovery Services vault in the same region as the storage account. The vault can be in the same or a different subscription. This is useful when a central team manages backups across subscriptions. You can optionally include Azure Files in storage accounts with a specified tag to control the scope of the policy assignment.

name: d8a9593e-791e-4fd7-9b22-a75b76e5de17
display_name: Enable logging by category group for microsoft.documentdb/mongoclusters to Event Hub

description: CMA_0256 - Establish a password policy

name: d8d639f5-1c93-4893-8d3c-cd5106d3ebc4
display_name: Service Bus should restrict access to external private endpoints
description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. Limiting private endpoint approvals to in-tenant subscriptions prevents cross-tenant data exfiltration and confines Service Bus connectivity to approved mission workloads; see https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/service-bus-messaging/private-endpoint-service.

name: d8ef30eb-a44f-47af-8524-ac19a36d41d2
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1488 - Alternate Work Site

description: Microsoft implements this System and Services Acquisition control

name: d93fe1be-13e4-421d-9c21-3158e2fa2667
display_name: Implement plans of action and milestones for security program process
description: CMA_C1737 - Implement plans of action and milestones for security program process

name: d96163de-dbe0-45ac-b803-0e9ca0f5764e
display_name: Windows machines should configure Windows Defender to update protection signatures within one day
description: To provide adequate protection against newly released malware, Windows Defender protection signatures need to be updated regularly to account for newly released malware. This policy is not applied to Arc connected servers and it requires that the Guest Configuration prerequisites have been deployed to the policy assignment scope. For more information on Guest Configuration, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

name: d9844e8a-1437-4aeb-a32c-0c992f056095
display_name: Public network access should be disabled for MySQL servers
description: Disable the public network access property to improve security and ensure your Azure Database for MySQL can only be accessed from a private endpoint. This configuration strictly disables access from any public address space outside of Azure IP range, and denies all logins that match IP or virtual network-based firewall rules.

name: d98f63ed-e319-4dc3-898f-600953a05f7e
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Azure Managed Grafana (microsoft.dashboard/grafana) to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for Azure Managed Grafana (microsoft.dashboard/grafana).

name: d9af7f88-686a-5a8b-704b-eafdab278977
display_name: Obtain legal opinion for monitoring system activities
description: CMA_C1688 - Obtain legal opinion for monitoring system activities

name: d9b2d63d-a233-4123-847a-7f7e5f5d7e7a
display_name: Azure Health Data Services de-identification service should use private link
description: Azure Health Data Services de-identification service should have at least one approved private endpoint connection. Clients in a virtual network can securely access resources that have private endpoint connections through private links.

name: d9d48ffb-0d8c-0bd5-5f31-5a5826d19f10
display_name: Disable authenticators upon termination
description: CMA_0169 - Disable authenticators upon termination

name: d9da03a1-f3c3-412a-9709-947156872263
display_name: Azure HDInsight clusters should use encryption in transit to encrypt communication between Azure HDInsight cluster nodes
description: Data can be tampered with during transmission between Azure HDInsight cluster nodes. Enabling encryption in transit addresses problems of misuse and tampering during this transmission.

name: d9edcea6-6cb8-0266-a48c-2061fbac4310
display_name: Plan for continuance of essential business functions
description: CMA_C1255 - Plan for continuance of essential business functions

description: Configures the Microsoft Defender for Endpoint integration settings, within Microsoft Defender for Cloud (also known as WDATP), for Windows downlevel machines onboarded to MDE via MMA, and auto provisioning of MDE on Windows Server 2019 , Windows Virtual Desktop and above. Must be turned on in order for the other settings (WDATP_UNIFIED, etc.) to work. See: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/defender-for-cloud/integration-defender-for-endpoint for more information.

description: Use managed identities to wrap around service principals, simplify cluster management and avoid the complexity required to managed service principals. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/aks-update-managed-identities

display_name: Azure Firewall Policy should enable Threat Intelligence
description: Threat intelligence-based filtering can be enabled for your firewall to alert and deny traffic from/to known malicious IP addresses and domains. The IP addresses and domains are sourced from the Microsoft Threat Intelligence feed.

display_name: [Preview]: Virtual network gateways should be Zone Redundant
description: Virtual network gateways can be configured to be Zone Redundant or not. Virtual network gateways whose SKU name or tier does not end with 'AZ' are not Zone Redundant. This policy identifies Virtual network gateways lacking the redundancy needed to withstand a zone outage.

Learn more at: https://aka.ms/integration-service-environment. Deploying into Integration Service Environment also allows encryption with customer-managed keys which provides enhanced data protection by allowing you to manage your encryption keys. This is often to meet compliance requirements.

description: Disable admin account for your registry so that it is not accessible by local admin. Disabling local authentication methods like admin user, repository scoped access tokens and anonymous pull improves security by ensuring that container registries exclusively require Azure Active Directory identities for authentication. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/acr/authentication.

description: Periodically, newer versions are released for TLS either due to security flaws, include additional functionality, and enhance speed. Upgrade to the latest TLS version for Function apps to take advantage of security fixes, if any, and/or new functionalities of the latest version.

The Private Link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. By mapping private endpoints to Azure Recovery Services vaults, data leakage risks are reduced. Learn more about private links at: https://aka.ms/AB-PrivateEndpoints.

name: df252a1c-21f9-4594-bc87-16422955e2dd

The Private Link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network. By mapping private endpoints to the IoT Hub device provisioning service, data leakage risks are reduced. Learn more about private links at: https://aka.ms/iotdpsvnet.

display_name: App Service app slots should be injected into a virtual network.
description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. App Service app slots should be injected into a virtual network.

display_name: The legacy Log Analytics extension should not be installed on Azure Arc enabled Windows servers
description: Automatically prevent installation of the legacy Log Analytics Agent as the final step of migrating from legacy agents to Azure Monitor Agent. After you have uninstalled existing legacy extensions, this policy will deny all future installations of the legacy agent extension on Azure Arc enabled Windows servers. Learn more: https://aka.ms/migratetoAMA

display_name: Manage transfers between standby and active system components

display_name: Azure Firewall Policy Analytics should be Enabled

This policy provides a way to audit if the Azure Database for MariaDB has virtual network service endpoint being used.

description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. description: Azure Front Door Premium supports Azure managed WAF rules and private link to supported Azure origins.

display_name: Enable logging by category group for Data Lake Storage Gen1 (microsoft.datalakestore/accounts) to Log Analytics
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to a Log Analytics workspace for Data Lake Storage Gen1 (microsoft.datalakestore/accounts).

display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1673 - Flaw Remediation | Automated Flaw Remediation Status
description: Microsoft implements this System and Information Integrity control

name: e016b22b-e0eb-436d-8fd7-160c4eaed6e2
display_name: Configure Azure Cache for Redis to use private DNS zones
description: Use private DNS zones to override the DNS resolution for a private endpoint. A private DNS zone can be linked to your virtual network to resolve to Azure Cache for Redis. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/privatednszone.

name: e04e5000-cd89-451d-bb21-a14d24ff9c73
display_name: Auditing on Synapse workspace should be enabled
description: Auditing on your Synapse workspace should be enabled to track database activities across all databases on the dedicated SQL pools and save them in an audit log.

name: e068b215-0026-4354-b347-8fb2766f73a2
display_name: Windows machines should meet requirements for 'User Rights Assignment'
description: Windows machines should have the specified Group Policy settings in the category 'User Rights Assignment' for allowing log on locally, RDP, access from the network, and many other user activities. This policy requires that the Guest Configuration prerequisites have been deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

name: e089ecb6-8b98-4b7b-b26b-9bbee7385395
display_name: Storage accounts should use customer-managed key for encryption in Mission Platform products and services
description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. Secure your blob and file storage account with greater flexibility using customer-managed keys. When you specify a customer-managed key, that key is used to protect and control access to the key that encrypts your data. Using customer-managed keys provides additional capabilities to control rotation of the key encryption key or cryptographically erase data.

name: e0a2b1a3-f7f9-4569-807f-2a9edebdf4d9
display_name: Cosmos DB should use a virtual network service endpoint
description: This policy audits any Cosmos DB not configured to use a virtual network service endpoint.

display_name: Windows machines should meet requirements for 'Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy)'
description: Windows machines should have the specified Group Policy settings in the category 'Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy)' for automatic logon, screen saver, network behavior, safe DLL, and event log. This policy requires that the Guest Configuration prerequisites have been deployed to the policy assignment scope. For details, visit https://aka.ms/gcpol.

Due to a security fix included in version 1.6.8-1 of the OMI package for Linux, all machines should be updated to the latest release. Upgrade apps/packages that use OMI to resolve the issue. For more information, see https://aka.ms/omiguidance.

name: e7ba2cb3-5675-4468-8b50-8486bdd998a5
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1169 - Continuous Monitoring | Trend Analyses
description: Microsoft implements this Security Assessment and Authorization control

name: e7c86682-34c1-488a-9aab-9cb279207992
display_name: Enable logging by category group for Service Bus Namespaces (microsoft.servicebus/namespaces) to Event Hub
description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This policy deploys a diagnostic setting using a category group to route logs to an Event Hub for Service Bus Namespaces (microsoft.servicebus/namespaces).

name: e802a67a-daf5-4436-9ea6-f6d821dd0c5d
display_name: Enforce SSL connection should be enabled for MySQL database servers
description: Azure Database for MySQL supports connecting your Azure Database for MySQL server to client applications using Secure Sockets Layer (SSL). Enforcing SSL connections between your database server and your client applications helps protect against 'man in the middle' attacks by encrypting the data stream between the server and your application. This configuration enforces that SSL is always enabled for accessing your database server.

name: e80b6812-0bfa-4383-8223-cdd86a46a890
display_name: Microsoft Managed Control 1237 - Software Usage Restrictions | Open Source Software
description: Microsoft implements this Configuration Management control

name: e8185402-357b-4768-8058-f620bc0ae6b5
display_name: Configure Azure Monitor Private Link Scopes with private endpoints
description: Private endpoints connect your virtual networks to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. By mapping private endpoints to Azure Monitor Private Link Scopes, you can reduce data leakage risks. Learn more about private links at: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/logs/private-link-security.

name: e84e8a9a-f43e-46e3-9458-bbcfb2d7e429
display_name: Configure Azure Virtual Desktop hostpools to disable public network access only for session hosts
description: Disable public network access for your Azure Virtual Desktop hostpool session hosts, but allow public access for end users. This allows users to still access AVD service while ensuring the session host is only accessible through private routes. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/avdprivatelink.

name: e8775d5a-73b7-4977-a39b-833ef0114628
display_name: Azure Managed Grafana workspaces should disable public network access
description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that your Azure Managed Grafana workspace isn't exposed on the public internet. Creating private endpoints can limit exposure of your workspaces.

name: e8794316-d918-4565-b57d-6b38a06381a0
display_name: [Deprecated]: Azure Security agent should be installed on your Linux virtual machines
description: Install the Azure Security agent on your Linux virtual machines in order to monitor your machines for security configurations and vulnerabilities. Results of the assessments can seen and managed in Azure Security Center.

name: e87a87f5-e6dd-4919-be21-abb0a4ea4630
display_name: Add a tag to Network Virtual Appliances (NVAs) VMs and VMSS for MANA support
description: Applies a tag for Marketplace NVA deployments when the NVA is using existing VM sizes. Please refer to https://aka.ms/manasupportforexistingvmfamilynva.

name: e89436d8-6a93-3b62-4444-1d2a42ad56b2
display_name: Reevaluate access upon personnel transfer
description: CMA_0424 - Reevaluate access upon personnel transfer

display_name: Lab Services should not allow template virtual machines for labs
description: This policy prevents creation and customization of a template virtual machines for labs managed through Lab Services.

display_name: [Deprecated]: Vulnerabilities in container security configurations should be remediated
description: Audit Docker security vulnerabilities and display recommendations in Azure Security Center. This policy is deprecated due to Azure Monitoring agent deprecation. Learn more at aka.ms/policydefdeprecation.

name: e8d096bc-85de-4c5f-8cfb-857bd1b9d62d
display_name: Deploy Diagnostic Settings for Data Lake Storage Gen1 to Event Hub
description: Deploys the diagnostic settings for Data Lake Storage Gen1 to stream to a regional Event Hub when any Data Lake Storage Gen1 which is missing this diagnostic settings is created or updated.

name: e8eef0a8-67cf-4eb4-9386-14b0e78733d4
display_name: Container registries should use private link
description: Azure Private Link lets you connect your virtual network to Azure services without a public IP address at the source or destination. The private link platform handles the connectivity between the consumer and services over the Azure backbone network.By mapping private endpoints to your container registries instead of the entire service, you'll also be protected against data leakage risks. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/acr/private-link.
